channel.title: 6-8 件事 (2026/4/9)
channel.description: 嘿，今天的技术资讯圈还挺热闹的，尤其是围绕“AI编程”这个核心。我帮你筛了一遍，发现有几个特别值得你留意的动态：首先是GitHub上涌现了一批直接针对Claude Code等AI编程工具的“技能”或增强工具，感觉开发者社区正在把AI编程助手玩出花来；其次，关于Codex、Claude Code这些主流工具的额度、更新和替代方案的讨论非常火热，看来大家都在精打细算地“薅羊毛”和寻找最优工作流；最后，Meta发布了名为Muse Spark的新项目，号称要迈向“个人超级智能”，虽然听起来有点宏大，但可能代表了AI Agent发展的一个新方向。

item.title: 6-8 件事
item.description: 嘿，今天的技术资讯圈还挺热闹的，尤其是围绕“AI编程”这个核心。我帮你筛了一遍，发现有几个特别值得你留意的动态：首先是GitHub上涌现了一批直接针对Claude Code等AI编程工具的“技能”或增强工具，感觉开发者社区正在把AI编程助手玩出花来；其次，关于Codex、Claude Code这些主流工具的额度、更新和替代方案的讨论非常火热，看来大家都在精打细算地“薅羊毛”和寻找最优工作流；最后，Meta发布了名为Muse Spark的新项目，号称要迈向“个人超级智能”，虽然听起来有点宏大，但可能代表了AI Agent发展的一个新方向。

item.title: milla-jovovich/mempalace
item.description: The highest-scoring AI memory system ever benchmarked. And it's free. | 近期热门 | 总 28328 stars
item.author: milla-jovovich

item.title: santifer/career-ops
item.description: AI-powered job search system built on Claude Code. 14 skill modes, Go dashboard, PDF generation, batch processing. | 近期热门 | 总 24967 stars
item.author: santifer

item.title: safishamsi/graphify
item.description: AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, OpenClaw, Factory Droid, Trae). Turn any folder of code, docs, papers, or images into a queryable knowledge graph | 近期热门 | 总 13357 stars
item.author: safishamsi

item.title: JuliusBrussee/caveman
item.description: 🪨 why use many token when few token do trick — Claude Code skill that cuts 65% of tokens by talking like caveman | 近期热门 | 总 7641 stars
item.author: JuliusBrussee

item.title: hilash/cabinet
item.description: AI-first knowledge base and startup OS | 近期热门 | 总 681 stars
item.author: hilash

item.title: Houseofmvps/codesight
item.description: Universal AI context generator. Saves thousands of tokens per conversation in Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Codex, and more. | 近期热门 | 总 605 stars
item.author: Houseofmvps

item.title: xoai/sage-wiki
item.description: An LLM-compiled personal knowledge base. Drop in your papers, articles, and notes. sage-wiki compiles them into a structured, interlinked wiki — with concepts extracted, cross-references discovered, and everything searchable. | 近期热门 | 总 283 stars
item.author: xoai

item.title: openabdev/openab
item.description: A lightweight, secure, cloud-native ACP harness that bridges Discord and any ACP-compatible coding CLI. | 近期热门 | 总 178 stars
item.author: openabdev

item.title: bitjaru/styleseed
item.description: Design engine that makes AI code like a UI/UX designer. Pick any brand skin, get professional UI. | 近期热门 | 总 125 stars
item.author: bitjaru
